reviews_data.review_text: My favorite coffee shop by far! Morgan and John do an excellent job, the coffee is exquisite and creative. Oh and the ambiance within Nave is incredibly unique. You should be a regular if you aren’t already.
just the best damn coffee in all of Charlotte.
The most creative coffee shop in Charlotte! Everything is so well balanced and not too sweet. Also: the branding is genius.

Hands down the best coffee in Charlotte. Their menu is thoughtful, the perfect balance of traditional and trendy. It’s locally owned by a Charlotte native who’s drawn inspiration from the other cities she loves. You can tell a lot of love has been poured in to this little corner within one of the most incredible interior design stores (owned by an incredible mother daughter duo). Everything about the space is perfect. Go for the vibe, the coffee, the people. You’ll feel like family the second your greeted at the counter. Yes, I’m fan-girling over here. Support local, leave happy!
Great Coffee.  Relaxed atmosphere.  Friendly service.  A must try for any coffee lover.

Best iced mocha I've had in Charlotte, and I've been everywhere 😎. Would highly recommend.

It's nice to be able to order your coffee and then look around the Nave store. They have some really cool antiques and the owners are super friendly. It's almost like an antique art gallery.
